headline: AI for Public Health: Disease Surveillance, Outbreak Prediction, and Population Health Analytics
description: AI public health systems detect disease outbreaks before they spread globally -- BlueDot flagged COVID-19 9 days before the WHO. From NLP surveillance of 100K+ sources in 65 languages to ML predicting disease prevalence by neighborhood, AI transforms public health from reactive response to proactive prevention.

citation.name: AI for Infectious Disease Surveillance and Outbreak Prediction: A Systematic Review of Deep Learning Approaches (2023-2025)
Machine Learning for Population Health: Social Determinants, Health Equity, and Predictive Analytics
